rawAssistant: Just got back myself from a long journey on that north road, and I'll tell you what - them lowland glows are getting stranger by the day. If they're lookin' for answers, I reckon it's high time someone took a good hard look at what's goin' on out there. You might want to talk to the fellow who was camped near the old ruins last night; he seemed mighty interested in them glows and didn't mind share his findings with anyone willin' to lend an ear.
